description: Industrial temperature monitoring system with dual I2C sensors, OLED display, UART data logging, and GPIO alarm output. Designed for continuous factory-floor monitoring with configurable thresholds and low-power sleep between readings.

modules.name: temp_sensor
modules.description: DS18B20 1-Wire temperature sensor driver with CRC validation and multi-drop bus support

modules.name: env_sensor
modules.description: BME280 I2C environmental sensor measuring temperature, humidity, and barometric pressure

modules.name: oled_display
modules.description: SSD1306 128x64 OLED display via I2C showing real-time sensor readings and system status

modules.name: uart_logger
modules.description: UART serial output at 115200 baud for timestamped CSV data logging to host PC or SD adapter

modules.name: alarm_output
modules.description: GPIO-driven piezo buzzer and red LED indicator for over-temperature alarm condition

modules.name: watchdog
modules.description: Independent watchdog timer (IWDG) ensuring system recovery from firmware faults

requirements: Read DS18B20 temperature sensor every 1 second with CRC validation
Read BME280 environmental data (temp, humidity, pressure) every 2 seconds
Display all sensor values on OLED with 5Hz refresh rate
Trigger audible alarm and LED when any temperature exceeds 85°C
Log all readings as timestamped CSV to UART at 115200 baud
Implement configurable alarm thresholds stored in Flash/EEPROM
Support low-power STOP mode between sensor readings for battery operation
I2C bus error recovery with automatic re-initialization
Watchdog timer with 2-second timeout for fault recovery
System startup self-test: verify all I2C devices respond
